title: FortiGate Edge Intrusions | Stolen Service Accounts Lead to Rogue Workstations a

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — FortiGate Edge Intrusions | Stolen Service Accounts Lead to 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/20
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*delete.me*'
            - '*mail.io*'
            - '*paswr.zip*'
            - '*storage.googleapis*'
            - '*system.admin*'
            - '*user.local*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
